title: mello package envelope (v1)
description: Contents of mello.package.json at the root of every published package zip.

melloSpecVersion.description: Locked to '1' for this schema version. Bumping is a breaking change.

type.description: Which Pasmello-native manifest is nested inside this package.

scope.description: GitHub login (lowercased). Globally unique ownership scope.

name.description: Package name within the scope. Lowercase, alphanumeric + dot/underscore/dash.

version.description: SemVer 2.0.0. Versions are immutable once published.

github.description: GitHub login of the author. Must match `scope` (case-insensitive) for the MVP — co-owners are granted via /owners endpoint, not via this field.

license.description: SPDX license identifier or expression, or 'UNLICENSED'.

readme.description: Path within the zip to a Markdown README. If omitted, the detail page falls back to `description`.

pasmelloPluginSpecVersion.description: Semver range pinning the expected Pasmello manifest schema version.

dependencies.description: Dependencies on other mello packages. Resolution is client-side (CLI or Pasmello host).
